input.idea: willbuy.dev — a synthetic visitor panel for pricing pages, landing pages, and checkout flows. Users paste a URL (or two for paired A/B), pick or author an ICP, and the service runs N independent LLM-based 'visitors' against the page. Each visitor returns structured feedback (will-to-buy, questions, confusions, objections, unanswered blockers, next action). Results aggregate into a conversion-weighted report. Differentiator: paired A/B design — same backstory visits both variants in independent fresh-context sessions, isolating page effect from persona variance. ICP: SaaS / ecommerce marketers and founders iterating on conversion pages before they have enough traffic for live A/B tests. Stack: Stripe billing, self-hosted Supabase, Cloudflare for DNS/SSL, preview environments per PR.
